hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(mcfunction)$|/recipe/[^/]+\.json$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER gameplay file modified — si ce changement impacte le joueur (craft, minion, economie, timers, prix de vente), mettre a jour HowToPlay.md avant de terminer."}}' || true; }
